title: holodiscus dumosus
intro: Holodiscus dumosus, also known as the sticky or oval-leaved rosy spirea, is a flowering plant native to western North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Holodiscus dumosus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, with the flowers often being used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
